title: Contact Outreach Input
description: Batch input for AI-powered contact form outreach. Each entry contains a _meta object with workflow control and dynamic fields that will be semantically mapped to form elements.

_meta.description: Workflow control fields. Never mapped to form elements.

contactFormURL.description: The URL of the contact form to fill and submit.

notes.description: Optional operator notes — context for the agent, not submitted.

skipCaptcha.description: If true, skip this entry when CAPTCHA is detected instead of attempting to solve.

additionalProperties.description: Dynamic form fields. Keys are semantic field names (e.g., 'name', 'email', 'message') that will be AI-mapped to actual form elements.
